The Microsoft AI Platform

Click any persona to trace their journey, or click a star to learn what it does and who uses it. The IQ band at the bottom of the constellation is also clickable — each layer opens a deep-dive modal.

Cowork is universal. Every persona reaches it — because handing a mission to an agent that works on your behalf isn't a technical skill, it's a natural human instinct. M365 Copilot is the gateway — Microsoft 365 apps, Dynamics 365, Power Apps, and 1st Party Agents all surface through it. The dashed external agents node represents agents built anywhere, governed here.

M365 experiences

Dynamics 365
Power Apps
External agents

A single chat tool

One surface for every employee regardless of what they actually need. Great for quick answers — but it can't be governed at enterprise scale, grounded in business semantics, or wired to your operational data and workflows.

vs.

An integrated intelligence platform

One control plane, 20+ capabilities, every persona served at the right depth. The Explorer gets fast answers. The Builder gets governed agents at scale. The Developer gets full architectural control. The Steward governs all of it.

The intelligence foundation: Work IQ, Foundry IQ, Fabric IQ.

Announced at Microsoft Ignite 2025, these three layers are what separates a capable agent from a truly intelligent one. Click any card (or the SVG bands at the bottom of the constellation) for a deep dive.

Work IQ

Know you. Know your role.

Role & people-aware inference. Ingests mail, files, meetings, and behavioral signals to give every agent durable memory of who you are, what you do, and how you work.

M365 CopilotCoworkAI Teammates

Feeds into → Foundry IQ as a grounding signal for all agents.

Foundry IQ

One grounding endpoint.

Aggregates Work IQ, Fabric IQ, custom apps, and web into a single knowledge endpoint — so agents ground answers, select the right model, and route tasks consistently.

Azure AI FoundryCopilot StudioMulti-agent routing

The unified layer making model choice and grounding consistent across every agent.

Fabric IQ

Business meaning, not just tables.

Semantic intelligence layer in Fabric. Ontology maps business entities, rules, and KPIs so agents reason with business meaning. Operations Agents act autonomously within defined bounds.

OntologyGraph reasoningOperations Agents

Powers Fabric Data Agents; grounds all analytical intelligence in Foundry IQ.

A great frontier model

Necessary — and Microsoft gives you access to every frontier model too. But reasoning alone doesn't know who you are, what your business data means, or which tool to call next.

+

Work IQ + Fabric IQ + Foundry IQ

Layer role-aware context, business-semantic grounding, and a unified routing endpoint around any frontier model — and it acts on the right information, for the right person, in the right way.

How trust evolves — and how the platform grows with it.

People don't jump to building agents. They start with a question, gain confidence, and only then begin to delegate, build, and orchestrate.

Curiosity

"Can it answer this?" M365 Copilot, Researcher, Analyst — grounded in their world via Work IQ.

M365 Copilot · Researcher · Analyst

Confidence

"Shape it for my team." Agent Builder for simple agents; Copilot Studio for enterprise depth and AI Teammates.

Agent Builder · Copilot Studio

Delegation

"Go do this for me." Cowork takes a mission, draws on Skills & Plugins, works on your behalf. Every persona reaches here.

Cowork · Skills & Plugins

Scale

"Govern it across the enterprise." Power Platform, Workflows, Fabric IQ, multi-agent orchestration — one governance plane.

Power Platform · Workflows · Fabric IQ

Mastery

"Build exactly what we need." Foundry and Coding Agents for purpose-built agents — inside your tenant and BAA.

Foundry · Coding Agents · Clawpilot

Every star in the constellation.

Click any card to focus that capability and see its connections.

On the horizon · Build 2026

AI Teammates — built once, from anywhere, governed everywhere.

An agent built in Copilot Studio, Azure AI Foundry, or even on a third-party platform can be instantiated by any employee as their own AI Teammate. Each clone earns its own Entra identity, Work IQ memory, and M365 access. Teammates communicate with each other and grow with their managers over time.

AI Teammates can originate from:
Copilot StudioAzure AI FoundryExternal / 3rd-party agents
Governed in all cases by Agent365 — regardless of origin.
Microsoft AI Platform · An integrated constellation — governed by Agent365, grounded by Work IQ · Foundry IQ · Fabric IQ

Up to 7 personas per template. Active template drives the constellation.
